case_title: PATEL, CHHOTUBHAI B. vs. GRIFFIN, MANNUEL WAYNE et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, MANNUEL WAYNE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, MANNUEL WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 387 ELLIS STREET, ROOM #410, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-20-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 9:00AM. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WVS RENT & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC.DEF AGREES NOT TO DAMAGE PREMISES AND PAY IF HE CAUSES ANY. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION.
